{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Mirage: Awakened}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Pt-Cont Transistor
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-12
|source=Grandmaster Scrolls (0.79%), Wishing (0.07%)
|description=On May 12, 1947 AD, Shockley developed a Point-Cont Transistor.

An invention from Shockely, Bardeen, and Brattain. The precursor to the micro-evolution revolution. With a small, low-power electron device replacing the bulky, high-power electron tube, it laid the foundation for a generation of ICs, microprocessers, and computer memory, thanks to the emergence of transistors.

[Pros]

Small: Light weight helps the miniaturization of electron devices<br>Low voltage: It can use batteries<br>No warm-up: No waiting for the cathode to head up<br>Mass production: through semiconductor
|fame=68
|art=59
|fth=71
|civ=58
|tech=106
|ss1=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +3%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +24<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25
|ss2=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +4%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +32<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +32<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25
|ss3=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +5%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +40<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +40<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25
|ss4=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +7%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +56<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +56<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25
|ss5=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +9%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +72<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +72<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25
|ss6=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +12%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +96<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +96<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25
|ss7=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +12%<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail ATK +96<br>Per 5 Tool Chests opened, Snail RUSH +96<br>Tool Chests Opened: 25/25<br>Snail RUSH +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail HP +6,000
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail DEF +120 each round
|skill3=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Wind RES +60
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Mecha Minion Cloning Speed Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Tool Chest Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Wind RES Boost]]
[[Category:Organ Boost]]
[[Category:Incense Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Crystal of Will]]
[[Category:Keyboard Warrior Boost]]
